		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:bishop_theocratic_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = bishop_theocratic_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:holy_order_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = holy_order_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:mercenary_company_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = mercenary_company_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:city_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = city_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_antagonistic_partition_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:clan_competitive_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_competitive_partition_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:clan_impassive_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_impassive_partition_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:clan_friendly_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_friendly_partition_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = clan_harmonious_partition_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:herder_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = herder_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_military_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = celestial_military_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_regency_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_regency_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_military_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = japanese_military_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:mandala_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_regency_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = meritocratic_regency_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_0
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_0 } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_1
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_1 } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_2
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_2 } }
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_3
			story_owner = { NOT = { has_realm_law = tribal_authority_3 } }
		}
	}
}

dm_reform_target_is_valid_trigger = {
	# ROOT: reform story
	OR = {
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_redirected_to_border_wars_law
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:top_liege_not_redirected_to_border_wars_law
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:candidate_score_merit_law
			story_owner = {
				has_title = title:h_china
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:candidate_score_prestige_law
			story_owner = {
				has_title = title:h_china
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_liege_law_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_army_vassal_law_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_bureaucracy_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_4
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:celestial_retirement_law_5
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_legacy_head
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_titular_liege
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:crown_authority_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_feudal_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_republic_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_theocracy_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_clan_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_tribal_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_wanua_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes

				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom

			}

				}

			}
		}

			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes

				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {

			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes

				}

				NOT = {

				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_japan_administrative_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_japan_feudal_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_nomad_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:dm_government_reform_steppe_admin_law
			story_owner = {
				is_landed = yes
				is_independent_ruler = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_kingdom
				NOT = {
					has_character_flag = dm_government_reform_cooldown
				}
				is_landed = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:grand_chancellor_law
			story_owner = {
				has_title = title:h_china
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:grand_marshal_law
			story_owner = {
				has_title = title:h_china
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:grand_censor_law
			story_owner = {
				has_title = title:h_china
				government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:imperial_bureaucracy_1
			story_owner = {

		}
		AND = {

		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:manor_reform_law
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:bandit_crackdown_law
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_bureaucracy_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_powerful_gentry
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
				any_vassal = {
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_local_talent
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
				any_vassal = {
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_favor_nepotism
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
				any_vassal = {
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_talent_only
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
				any_vassal = {
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_candidate_preference_policy_bureaucrat_promotion
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
				any_vassal = {
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_revoke_title_policy_prohibit_revoke
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_revoke_title_policy_allow_revoke
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_succession_rights_policy_hereditary
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_succession_rights_policy_forced_partition
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_succession_rights_policy_grant_recognition
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_succession_rights_policy_court_supervision
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_succession_rights_policy_governor_appointment
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_title_leave_realm_policy_allowed
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_title_leave_realm_policy_restricted
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_war_policy_no_restriction
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_war_policy_prohibit_internal_wars
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_war_policy_prohibit_all_wars
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:law_vassal_war_policy_permanent_prohibit_all_wars
			story_owner = {
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_duchy
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:mandala_decree_none
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:mandala_decree_prosperity
			story_owner = {
			}
		}

				is_landed = yes
				highest_held_title_tier >= tier_county

			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:confederate_partition_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				NOR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
					government_has_flag = government_is_clan
					government_has_flag = government_is_administrative
					government_has_flag = government_is_mandala
					government_has_flag = government_is_celestial
					government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
					government_has_flag = government_is_steppe_admin
					has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
				can_have_confederate_partition_succession_law_trigger = yes
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						exists = primary_title
					}
					is_confederation_member = no
				}
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:partition_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {

						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative

					government_has_flag = government_is_mandala

					government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic

					has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law

							exists = primary_title

						is_confederation_member = yes

				}

					government_has_flag = government_is_mandala

					government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic

					has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law

			var:dm_reform_target = flag:single_heir_succession_law

				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP

						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law

					has_realm_law = feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
					subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				}
				trigger_if = {
					limit = {
						government_allows = administrative
					}
					OR = {
						government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
						is_independent_ruler = yes
						tgp_is_ceremonial_liege_trigger = yes
					}
				}
				NOT = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_nomadic
				}
				can_have_single_heir_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}

					}
				}
				government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
				can_have_japanese_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
				is_independent_ruler = no
				can_have_japanese_appointment_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:japanese_military_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
				is_independent_ruler = no
				government_allows = administrative
				is_independent_ruler = no
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:mandala_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				realm_law_is_mandala = yes
				realm_law_is_mandala = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				is_independent_ruler = no
				government_allows = administrative
				is_independent_ruler = no
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_military_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				government_has_flag = government_is_meritocratic
				is_independent_ruler = no
				government_allows = administrative
				is_independent_ruler = no
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:meritocratic_regency_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				government_allows = administrative
				government_allows = merit
				tgp_realm_has_ceremonial_liege_trigger = yes
				can_have_meritocratic_regency_succession_law_trigger = yes
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_appointment_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				is_independent_ruler = no
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:feudal_governor_promotion_succession_law
			story_owner = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					text = CANT_CHANGE_LAW_TOOLTIP
					NOR = {
						has_realm_law = mandala_succession_law
						government_has_flag = government_is_japan_administrative
						subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
						subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
					}
				}
				is_independent_ruler = no
				OR = {
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal
					government_has_flag = government_is_feudal_admin
				}
				subject_contract_has_flag = succession_rights_governor_appointment
				subject_contract_has_flag = candidate_preference_bureaucrat_promotion
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_0
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_1
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_2
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
		AND = {
			var:dm_reform_target = flag:tribal_authority_3
			story_owner = {
			}
		}
	}
}
